File Information
Collection: ShopEasy API Testing — DummyJSON (QA Excellence Assignment 2)
Environment: ShopEasy — DummyJSON QA Environment
Collection Description
Postman collection demonstrating the ShopEasy e-commerce API testing challenge (from QA Excellence slides) using DummyJSON as the live test environment. Base URL: https://dummyjson.com Modules: Authentication · Product Catalog · Shopping Cart · User Management 12 endpoints × (1 positive + 1 negative) = 24 test requests. Bonus: Collection-level pre-request script auto-fetches and caches the Bearer token.
